title: Lead SEO Specialist at Zostel Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Zostel Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zostel Asia Pacific Associates family as a SEO Specialist in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zostel Asia Pacific Associates:
Zostel Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel Asia Pacific Associates!
